title: salix dalungensis
intro: Salix dalungensis, also known as Dalung willow, is a species of willow tree native to the Sichuan province in China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix dalungensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections. The herbal preparations of Salix dalungensis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and ointments for topical application.
